name: Chat Input
description: Message composition area with auto-growing textarea, file attachments, mentions autocomplete, and keyboard shortcuts.

standard.description: Auto-expanding textarea with attach and send buttons

slots.attachments-preview: Staged file thumbnails with remove buttons
Staged file thumbnails with remove buttons

visual_brief: Anchored input bar at the bottom of the chat viewport with a subtle top border separator. The textarea auto-grows from one line up to a max height, with a muted placeholder. An attachment button (paperclip icon) sits to the left and a send button (arrow-up icon) sits to the right, coloring to accent when the input has content. Staged file attachments render as thumbnail pills above the textarea with individual remove buttons.

responsive.mobile: Input bar stretches full width with 12px horizontal padding. Textarea font size bumps to 16px to prevent iOS zoom. Attachment previews scroll horizontally as a single row. Send button uses a compact 36px icon-only variant. Mentions popup renders as a bottom sheet rather than a dropdown.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout with comfortable padding. Formatting toolbar (rich preset) shows as a single scrollable row above the textarea. Mentions popup renders as a floating dropdown anchored to the cursor position.
responsive.desktop: Full-featured input with optional formatting toolbar. Send button shows label text alongside icon. Character/token counter appears in the bottom-right corner. Keyboard shortcut hints shown on hover (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline).

motion.textarea-grow: Height transitions with a 150ms ease-out when content grows or shrinks. No animation on initial render.
motion.send-button: Send icon rotates 45 degrees and scales to 0.9 on press, returns on release (100ms spring). Button color transitions from muted to accent over 200ms when input becomes non-empty.
motion.attachment-add: New attachment thumbnails scale from 0.8 to 1.0 with 150ms ease-out. Remove animation scales to 0.8 and fades out over 120ms.
motion.mentions-popup: Dropdown slides down from the cursor position with 150ms ease-out and fades in. Dismiss reverses the animation.
